rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ELLA LOUISE MORGAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to July 9, 2019 for proper notice of the amendment to the petition. the proof of service was dated July 1, 2019 and the amendment was not filed until July 7, 2019. notice cannot be mailed before the pleading requiring notice is filed. LRSF 14.21.A. new notice for July 9 is required, with the new POS filed no later than noon on July 3, 2019. in addition, a file stamped courtesy copy of the amendment and declaration filed june 7, 2019, must be provided to the examiner in Room 202 along with a proposed order, no later than noon on July 3, 2019. please note-->faxed or emailed copies and orders are NOT acceptec.
